description: WARZONE 5: World Simulation Engine - Time, Diplomacy, and Dynamic Events

techContext.typecheckCommand: mypy --strict src/contexts/world && npm --prefix frontend run type-check
techContext.conventions: Hexagonal Architecture. Domain Events. Result pattern. shadcn/ui + Tailwind only.

userStories.title: Domain - WorldCalendar Value Object
userStories.description: Create WorldCalendar value object with year, month, day, era_name fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: year (int), month (int), day (int), era_name (str), days_per_month (int=30), months_per_year (int=12)
Methods: advance(days) -> WorldCalendar, format() -> str, from_datetime(dt) -> WorldCalendar
Test: tests/unit/contexts/world/domain/test_world_calendar.py with edge cases (month rollover, year rollover)

userStories.title: Domain - Calendar Integration
userStories.description: Integrate WorldCalendar into WorldState aggregate, replacing raw datetime.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace world_time: datetime with calendar: WorldCalendar
Add from_datetime() migration for existing data

userStories.title: API - Calendar Router
userStories.description: Create API endpoints for calendar operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Add schemas to src/api/schemas.py: CalendarResponse, AdvanceCalendarRequest

userStories.title: Frontend - Calendar Display
userStories.description: Create React component to display and control calendar.
acceptanceCriteria: Display: formatted date, era name, Advance Time button
Use TanStack Query pattern from worldDataApi.ts

userStories.title: Domain - Enhance HistoryEvent
userStories.description: Add new fields to HistoryEvent entity for simulation support.
acceptanceCriteria: Add impact_scope: ImpactScope | None (LOCAL, REGIONAL, GLOBAL)
Add event_type: EventType | None (WAR, TRADE, DISCOVERY, POLITICAL, NATURAL, DEATH)
All new fields nullable for backward compatibility

userStories.title: API - Events Router
userStories.description: Create/update API endpoints for historical events.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /world/{world_id}/events - list events (paginated, filter by type/scope)

userStories.title: Frontend - Timeline Component
userStories.description: Create timeline component to display historical events.

userStories.title: Domain - DiplomaticStatus Enum
userStories.description: Create enum for diplomatic relationship statuses.
acceptanceCriteria: Enum values: ALLIED, FRIENDLY, NEUTRAL, COLD, HOSTILE, AT_WAR
Test: unit tests for mapping logic

userStories.title: Domain - DiplomacyMatrix Aggregate
userStories.description: Create aggregate to manage all faction diplomatic relations.
acceptanceCriteria: Wraps existing FactionRelation system from Faction entity
Methods: get_status(a, b), set_status(a, b, status), get_allies(faction), get_enemies(faction), to_matrix()
Validation: Prevent A->ALLIED and B->AT_WAR conflicts

userStories.title: API - Diplomacy Router
userStories.description: Create API endpoints for diplomacy operations.

userStories.title: Frontend - Diplomacy Matrix Grid
userStories.description: Create visual grid showing faction relationships.
acceptanceCriteria: Data grid: rows and columns = factions, cells = relationship color
Click cell opens edit relation modal

userStories.title: Domain - FactionIntent Entity
userStories.description: Create entity representing a faction's intended action.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: faction_id (str), intent_type (IntentType enum), target_id (str|None), priority (1-10), narrative (str)
IntentType enum: EXPAND, ATTACK, DEFEND, ALLY, TRADE, RECOVER

userStories.title: Application - FactionIntentGenerator
userStories.description: Create service to generate faction intents based on world state.
acceptanceCriteria: Method: generate_intents(faction: Faction, world: WorldState) -> list[FactionIntent]
Rule-based algorithm: low resources -> RECOVER, enemies weak -> ATTACK, no allies -> ALLY

userStories.title: Domain - SimulationTick Value Object
userStories.description: Create value object to record simulation step results.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: tick_id, calendar_before, calendar_after, events_generated (list), resource_changes (dict), diplomacy_changes (list)

userStories.title: Application - WorldSimulationService
userStories.description: Create main simulation service that advances world time and processes faction actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Method: advance_simulation(world_id: str, days: int) -> Result[SimulationTick, SimulationError]
Algorithm: snapshot -> advance calendar -> generate intents -> resolve -> apply -> return tick
Test: full simulation tick test with mocks

userStories.title: API - Simulation Router
userStories.description: Create API endpoints for simulation operations.

userStories.title: Domain - Character Birth Date
userStories.description: Add birth date field to Character entity for age tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: Add computed age property (requires current calendar context)
Null-safe: None birth_date returns None age

userStories.title: Domain - Character Location Tracking
userStories.description: Add location tracking to Character entity.

userStories.title: Application - Character Reaction
userStories.description: Create service for character reactions to world events.
acceptanceCriteria: Method: react_to_event(character_id: str, event: HistoryEvent) -> CharacterReaction
Reaction types: OBSERVE, FLEE, INVESTIGATE, IGNORE

userStories.title: Frontend - Character Location Display
userStories.description: Update LocationTree to show characters at each location.
acceptanceCriteria: Show character avatars under each location node
Click avatar opens character detail modal

userStories.title: Domain - Rumor Entity
userStories.description: Create entity for rumors that spread through the world.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: content (str), truth_value (0-100), origin_location_id (str), spread_locations (set), created_date (WorldCalendar)

userStories.title: Application - RumorPropagation
userStories.description: Create service to propagate rumors through locations.
acceptanceCriteria: Each tick: rumors spread to adjacent locations

userStories.title: Frontend - Rumor Board
userStories.description: Create component to display rumors at a location.

userStories.title: Application - SanityChecker
userStories.description: Create service to validate world state consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Rules: dead chars no location, zero-influence factions no territories, no circular location parents

userStories.title: Domain - WorldSnapshot Entity
userStories.description: Create entity for world state snapshots.
acceptanceCriteria: Fields: snapshot_id, world_id, calendar, state_json (serialized WorldState), created_at

userStories.title: Application - SnapshotService
userStories.description: Create service to manage world state snapshots.

userStories.title: API - Snapshot Router
userStories.description: Create API endpoints for snapshot operations.

userStories.title: Frontend - Simulation Dashboard
userStories.description: Create main simulation dashboard page.
acceptanceCriteria: Components: CalendarDisplay, Advance Time button, Recent Events feed, Faction status summary
